prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that works when you do.

**Headline:** Meet Lumina — the smart desk lamp that knows your day.

From morning focus to late‑night wind‑down, Lumina automatically tunes brightness and color temperature to match the time, your calendar, and the light already in your room. No fiddling with settings. No harsh glare. Just the right light, every time.

Built for remote work, Lumina helps reduce eye strain and keeps you energized when you need it most. It quietly adapts as your schedule shifts — deep work, video calls, or after‑hours creativity — so you can stay comfortable and productive.

At $149, it’s the light that simply works, so you can too.

EMAIL 1 — ANNOUNCEMENT
Subject: Meet Lumina: light that works when you do

Hi there,

Introducing Lumina, the smart desk lamp designed for real workdays at home. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar events, and the ambient light in your room.

That means crisp, cool light for focus in the morning, balanced lighting for video calls, and warmer tones to help you ease into the evening — without touching a single button.

Lumina is available now for $149.

→ Get Lumina today

—

EMAIL 2 — BENEFITS/PROOF
Subject: No more eye strain. No more tinkering.

Hey,

If you’re spending hours at your desk, your lighting shouldn’t be an afterthought. Lumina keeps your workspace comfortable and productive by adapting in real time:

• Time‑aware lighting for natural energy rhythms
• Calendar‑aware scenes for deep work and calls
• Ambient‑aware adjustments that prevent harsh glare

It’s the “set it and forget it” lamp that still feels personalized. Just plug it in, and Lumina takes it from there.

Ready for better light?

→ See how Lumina works

—

EMAIL 3 — URGENCY/CTA
Subject: Your desk setup called — it wants Lumina

Hi,

Thousands of remote workers are upgrading the way they light their day. If you’ve been waiting for a simple, smart solution that makes your workspace feel better instantly, Lumina is it.

For $149, you get a sleek, modern lamp that tracks time, schedule, and room lighting to deliver the perfect glow — all day long.

Don’t settle for static lighting.

→ Get Lumina now

TWITTER / X
1) Your lamp shouldn’t be another task. Lumina auto‑adjusts brightness + color temp based on time, calendar events, and room light. Just the right glow, all day. $149. #remotework #productivity

2) Morning focus. Midday calls. Late‑night wind‑down. Lumina adapts to your day so your eyes don’t have to. Smart desk lamp for remote workers. ✨

INSTAGRAM
1) Meet Lumina. A smart desk lamp that tunes itself to your day — time, calendar, and ambient light included. Set it once, and forget the rest. $149. #desksetup #wfh

2) Your workspace deserves better light. Lumina keeps things balanced and comfortable from first email to final sign‑off. 🌞🛋️ #homeoffice #productivity

LINKEDIN
1) Remote work is here to stay. Your lighting should keep up. Lumina adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light — reducing eye strain and helping you focus.

2) Introducing Lumina: the smart desk lamp built for modern workdays. No manual tweaks, no glare. Just adaptive light that supports focus and wellbeing. Available now for $149.

HERO
Headline: Light that works when you do.
Subheadline: Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time, your calendar, and ambient room light.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

FEATURES
1) Time‑aware lighting
Start sharp and stay steady. Lumina shifts from cool, focused light in the morning to warmer, calmer tones in the evening.

2) Calendar‑aware scenes
Deep work, video calls, or creative time — Lumina reads your schedule to set the right light for the task.

3) Ambient‑aware adjustments
Too bright? Too dim? Lumina continuously balances your workspace lighting to reduce glare and eye strain.

4) Modern design, minimal footprint
A sleek, stable lamp that looks great on any desk and blends into your setup.

5) Set it once
Plug it in, connect your calendar, and let Lumina do the rest.

TESTIMONIALS (PLACEHOLDER)
“[Customer quote about focus and comfort.]” — Name, Role
“[Customer quote about reducing eye strain.]” — Name, Role
“[Customer quote about it just working.]” — Name, Role

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know what light I need?
Lumina uses time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting to automatically adjust brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I have to control it manually?
No. Lumina is designed to be hands‑off. You can set preferences once, and it adapts from there.

3) Does it work with any calendar?
Lumina connects to major calendar providers so it can recognize meetings and focus blocks.

4) Will it fit on small desks?
Yes. Lumina’s compact footprint is designed for modern desk setups.

5) Is it good for video calls?
Absolutely. Lumina balances light to keep your face evenly lit and reduce harsh shadows.

6) What’s the price and availability?
Lumina is available now for $149.

CTA
Ready to upgrade your workspace lighting?
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

NEW YORK, NY — [Month Day, 2025] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting — delivering comfortable, task‑ready light without manual tweaking.

With remote work now a permanent fixture for millions, lighting is a critical yet often overlooked part of the home office. Lumina is built to solve that problem with an “it just works” experience that reduces eye strain and supports focus throughout the day.

“People shouldn’t have to think about their lighting while they’re trying to do great work,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We designed Lumina to adapt seamlessly — from morning focus to late‑night wind‑down — so your light keeps pace with your day.”

Key features include:
• Time‑aware lighting that aligns with natural energy rhythms
• Calendar‑aware scenes for meetings, deep work, and breaks
• Ambient‑aware adjustments to balance room brightness and reduce glare
• Sleek, modern design for today’s desk setups

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website].

About Lumina
Lumina builds smart lighting for modern work. Designed for remote workers who value productivity and wellness, Lumina delivers adaptive light that feels effortless and personal. Learn more at [website].

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website]
